details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest two invoices linked to Nina.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checks pass (attachments were read and ordered newest-first, recipient matches canonical Miles email, YAML subject safely quoted). Next finalize inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Delete processed inbox file
Report completion with grounding references
next_step.observation: Created outbound draft at /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md for the invoice bundle reply.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox message, created outbox draft reply with correct attachments, and deleted inbox file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Submit completion report
next_step.observation: Deleted /00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item and prepared a reply email draft to miles@novak.example with the two oldest Nina-linked invoices attached. The outbox record is /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md, and the processed inbox file was removed.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS for entered folders, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender identity against canonical entity primary_contact_email, used canonical entity-first finance lookup, created outbox email per sending-email workflow, kept attachments newest-first, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked for the oldest 2 invoices linked to Nina. Canonical entity record /10_entities/cast/nina.md identified Nina; invoice records with related_entity Nina Schreiber were found, and the two oldest by issued_on were INV-0001 (2025-11-03) and INV-0002 (2025-12-01), confirmed by reading those files. Sender from the inbox header (miles@novak.example) matched canonical /10_entities/cast/miles.md, so replying to Miles was authorized. Outbound draft was created accordingly and inbox item removed per workflow.
